title: The Road to Whole Cake Island
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on the road to whole cake island within the The Road to Whole Cake Island storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A few days later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PURU RURU

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Big Mom's Pirate Ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PURU RURU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You'd think this was snow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Muhaha... It's cotton candy snow-de soire.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Den Den mushis have been ringing off the hook...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wow, so sweet...

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: It's because they're picking up the warning frequencies- Bon!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: This area is already part of Mama's territory- Southfle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do the waves reach over there as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Indeed! That is the #28 Tarte.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A small branch of...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Our big mom pirate crew-mile feuille! If this wasn't big mom's ship,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It would have been shot down-bon!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Stop playing hard to get and join our big mom pirate crew...

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Along with the rest of the Germa 66.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: That is what your father wishes of you-amour!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm just here to talk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He and I no longer have any relation. I cut my ties with him long ago.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Don't play the proud fool. Mama is in a more welcoming mood than you think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Of course, she knows that you're part of the straw hat crew-s'il vous plait,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And that you were once a chef on that floating restaurant in East Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: She thinks very highly of you-bon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Depending on your skills, you may well find yourself in quite comfortable circuit-stances index- duijour.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Cut the bullshit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Listen carefully! These hands of mine,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: They exist only to make food for my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've trained like a mad- man and gone through hell and back for that reason alone!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I bet those guys are missing my cooking right about now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Weeping uncontrollably because they don't have a chance to taste it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Muhaha! How fool- IsH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: mistake or not, there's not a single dish I'd serve to a group of people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: that saw fit to kill their own crew member.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Ah... that incident with pekoms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He let his personal feelings get in the way of his assign-ment.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: bege was right to do what he did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: BARON TAMAGO!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Vito.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: A pic- tune of Lady pudding has arrived from whole cake island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I guess he should get his heart ready, or, rather...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Marrying someone just after meeting them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Is indeed a cruel fate, so, consider this a courtesy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Marrying someone after a few days of getting to know them is pretty much the same damn thing! Who the hell even said I'd marry her anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Well, why don't you just take a look...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: This is your bride- to-be...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: The 35th daughter of the Charlotte family,

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Lady Charlotte

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ..ch. B2u/end

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: S-Sawhi he's really stepped in it now!

summary: The Road to Whole Cake Island: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
